docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLALTA, FRANCISCO SUED AS FRANCISCO VALLARTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2367 BRYANT ST, S.F, CA $2,666.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,666.50, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VILLALTA, FRANCISCO SUED AS FRANCISCO VALLARTA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $33.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNCH, PETER

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VILLALTA, FRANCISCO SUED AS FRANCISCO VALLARTA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNCH, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT VILLALTA, FRANCISCO SUED AS FRANCISCO VALLARTA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT VILLALTA, FRANCISCO SUED AS FRANCISCO VALLARTA
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VILLALTA, FRANCISCO SUED AS FRANCISCO VALLARTA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNCH, PETER COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-03-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
9/3/96 DEPT 5 JUDGE DESMOND CSR PDOWLING CLERK GMCGREW C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. WRITTEN & ORAL TESTIMONY TAKEN ON THE RECORD. COURT FINDS JUDGMENT FOR PLFT.
